$comment: Canonical, cross-implementation vote scenarios for the tally differential harness.
This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH consumed by BOTH sides:
Each voter has a weight and three per-outcome (approve, reject, abstain) vote and seed values.
Real anonymous ballots are one-hot in `votes` (exactly one 1), but the tally algebra is linear
so a few non-one-hot cases are included to exercise the pure accumulation. Values here MUST stay
within the documented contract-valid range (see differential-tally-spec.md): weight is u32,

scenarios.name: single_voter_approve
scenarios.note: Smallest non-trivial ballot: one approver, weight 1.

scenarios.name: weight_zero_only
scenarios.note: All voters have weight 0 (e.g. lone auto-abstain proposer). Every tally must be 0.

scenarios.name: all_abstain
scenarios.note: Everyone abstains -> approve/reject tallies are 0, proposal Cancelled.

scenarios.name: non_one_hot_weighted
scenarios.note: Non-one-hot vote values (mirrors test_dao.rs dao_anonymous) to exercise linear accumulation.

scenarios.name: max_seed_32bit_full_slate
scenarios.note: Seeds at the 32-bit ceiling (u32::MAX) across a full 3-way split; stresses seed accumulation.
